prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约24169名，2023年升至20760名（竞争加剧），2024年出现异常断档跌至83354名，2025年新高考首年物理类恢复至31541名。排除2024年断 档异常值后，近3年正常位次呈后移趋势，2025年基准约31541名；该校在四川省理科/物理类招生计划：2022年101人、2023年95人、2024年103人、2025年112人 ，2026年增至116人，较2025年扩招4人（+3.6%），扩招对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第76名，近年排名稳定 在76-77名区间，属于中上游211院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度未进入前100名，关注度一般；2022年曾出现师德师风类负 面事件，但影响已淡化；未见投档线断档记录；安全科学与工程为A+学科（与矿业工程学科群关联），测绘科学与技术、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势领域 ，对矿业、安全类相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生位次靠前；四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（物理类28.5万+历史类17.8万≈46.3万）明显增加，竞争加剧；该校位于 北京市，对四川考生具有地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次31541名、2026年扩招3.6%（缓解竞争）及四川省考生总数明 显增加（加剧竞争）三方面因素，扩招与考生增加效应相互抵消后竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约32017名，区间31517-32517名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 24,169; in 2023, it rose to 20,760 (increased competition); in 2024, an abnormal gap dropped it to 83,354; in 2025, the first year of the new Gaokao, the Physics Category recovered to 31,541. Excluding the 2024 gap anomaly, the normal rankings over the past three years show a backward trend, with the 2025 baseline around 31,541. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Sichuan: 101 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 103 in 2024, 112 in 2025, and increasing to 116 in 2026, an expansion of 4 students (+3.6%) compared to 2025, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 76-77 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; comprehensive Douyin popularity not in the top 100, with average attention; a negative incident related to teacher ethics occurred in 2022, but its impact has faded; no record of admission score gaps; Safety Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (associated with the mining engineering discipline cluster), and Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional strengths, attracting applicants to mining and safety-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity, with the university's related majors ranking higher in admissions; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Sichuan in 2026 is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from 2025 (Physics Category 285,000 + History Category 178,000 ≈ 463,000), intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has regional appeal for Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31,541, the 2026 expansion of 3.6% (alleviating competition), and the significant increase in the total number of Sichuan candidates (intensifying competition), the effects of expansion and candidate increase offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition; the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 32,017, with a range of 31,517-32,517.

- Environmental Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31,517-32,517, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (below 31,517), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit (around 32,517), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.
